## What We Were Doing
- Task: Fix GitHub Pages navigation (links were broken because Astro strips base path from href attributes)
- Progress:
  - [x] Built course website v3 (Astro 6 + Tailwind v4 + MDX content collections + Mermaid)
  - [x] Separated content/presentation — all text in MDX, zero hardcoded content in code
  - [x] Added mermaid diagrams inline in MDX (replaced hardcoded SVG component)
  - [x] Set up GitHub repo + GitHub Actions CI/CD + GitHub Pages deployment
  - [x] Fixed navigation: used `<base href="/ucla-lectures/">` + relative paths (no leading `/`)
  - [ ] User visual verification of live site — nav + mermaid rendering in browser
- Stop point: Just pushed nav fix, user needs to verify in browser

## Decisions
- MDX content collections over JSON → better writing experience for prose + structured frontmatter for tables
- Mermaid over inline SVG → editable in MDX body, no code changes needed
- `<base href="/ucla-lectures/">` + relative links → Astro 6 strips base from absolute hrefs, so relative paths + base tag is the only way GitHub Pages works
- Column widths in frontmatter `{ label, width }` → no content-based conditionals in code
- astro-mermaid for client-side rendering → zero config, all diagram types work
- GitHub Actions with pnpm → uses `packageManager` field from package.json (no duplicate version)

## Open Items
- User renamed title to "[DRAFT] AI/ML in Production" in overview.mdx — uncommitted, might want to continue renaming across all content files
- Mermaid diagrams render client-side — need JS enabled in browser, may look like raw code in non-JS contexts
- `pnpm dev` serves at root `/` not `/ucla-lectures/` — the `<base>` tag points to gh-pages path, so local dev nav links may resolve incorrectly. Consider making base tag conditional on build env.
- favicon at `href="favicon.svg"` — works with base tag on gh-pages but untested locally

## Notes
- Astro 6 auto-strips the `base` prefix from all `href` attributes in HTML output — this is the core gotcha
- Solution: `<base href="/ucla-lectures/">` tag + all internal links as relative (no leading `/`)
- External links (theasymptotic.substack.com, ollama.com, etc.) stay as absolute URLs, unaffected by base tag
- CSS/JS assets get `/ucla-lectures/` prefix automatically from Astro's asset pipeline
- Content/presentation split: 7 MDX files + 1 site.json = content; 9 astro/css files = presentation
- Every visible string comes from MDX frontmatter or MDX body — zero hardcoded content in code
- Vault notes: `/Users/eeshans/PersonalVault/ucla-ml-ops/ucla mlops course.md`
- User's reference sites: algebrica.org, ucla-starbucks-challenge.fly.dev
